title: Winter Survivor Protocol
desc: A multiplayer survival game. Players take on the role of survivors in a dire situation, searching for resources, crafting weapons, surviving amidst zombies and unknown dangers, and uncovering the secrets of the catastrophe.

title: Afternoon Affairs & Helpless Housewives
desc: Takumi Nakama is out of luck. He failed his college entrance exams and doesn't have the motivation to look for a job. After his parents give him an old, run-down apartment building to manage, he meets two ladies living there, both with troubles of their own...

title: Bubu Battle Royale
desc: Every step could be your last—move or be hunted.
